_comments.frequencies_hz: Target frequencies in Hz. Add or remove as needed.
_comments.sdr_gain: RTL-SDR gain — 'auto' or a numeric value like '40'.
_comments.sdr_ppm: Crystal frequency correction for your specific dongle (run rtl_test -p to find it).
_comments.simulate: Set true to run without real SDR/GPS hardware (for testing).
_comments.session_label: Tag applied to each session in the database.
